save_mode_unavailable_hint: Local catalogue server unavailable. Moment import is disabled.
context_hint: Enter a staged moment markdown filename and the moment metadata. This page imports body-only prose as draft source.
empty_state: Preview a source file to inspect the resolved moment metadata.
file_description: filename only; the source file is resolved from var/docs/catalogue/import-staging/moments/
preview_status_invalid: Fix source-file issues before importing the moment.
source_summary: Moment prose is imported as body-only Markdown. Metadata is stored in catalogue source JSON, not prose front matter.
image_guidance: Source images generate local moment thumbnails and staged primary srcsets during import. Missing images block media generation but do not block prose import.
preview_image_missing: no source image found; media generation will be blocked
source_result_summary: Import writes draft prose and metadata only. Publish from the Moment editor when ready.
import_result_success: Imported draft moment {moment_id}. Open the Moment editor to review and publish it.
import_result_missing_preview: Preview the source file before importing.
